# v1.8.0 is not released, so this file is maintained manually
# these images were used by both v1.7.* and v1.8.0
# and can't be purged from the running cluster
# when an image tag, e.g. harvester-webhook:v1.8.0, is added to v1.8.0 but not to v1.7.*
# it does not need to be included in this file
# because the generated file, e.g. v1.8.0-amd64-images-list.txt, is a to-kill list
# even if such images are in this list, they will be filtered from the final list
vmdp:2.5.5
